prompt: I've been building a Python chatbot that answers questions about our internal docs using Claude. It retrieves relevant chunks and then generates answers. Works okay manually but I'm worried about regressions every time I tweak the prompt. How do I set up a proper eval pipeline for this with pixie?
assertions: Explains instrumentation with @observe or start_observation around the relevant function
Shows or explains enable_storage() for persisting traces
Shows pixie dataset create and pixie dataset save CLI commands
Shows assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass in a test file
Recommends an appropriate evaluator (e.g. FactualityEval, ClosedQAEval)
Explains how to run tests with pixie-test
Mentions documenting understanding in memory files
